questions.question: Explain Dictionary Comprehensions and its primary use case in Python.
questions.answer: Dictionary Comprehensions provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Dictionary Comprehensions?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the Python runtime optimize Dictionary Comprehensions under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
